business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction, fabrication, equipment warehousing and storage

coverages_discussed.notes: 35 claims over loss summary period; total incurred $1,171,607; total paid $1,126,509
8 claims over loss summary period; total incurred $176,947; total paid $105,421
8 claims over loss summary period; total incurred $99,900; total paid $47,076; 15 scheduled drivers
1 claim over loss summary period; total incurred $36,750; total paid $36,750; TIV across 5 locations is $39,405,000
2024 policy year; 13 claims reported in 2024; prior carriers include Berkshire Hathaway Guard (2023), Zurich Insurance Group (2022), Nationwide Insurance (2021), CNA Financial (2020)

positives: All 5 locations are sprinklered except LOC-005 (Equipment Storage - Cranberry); 4 of 5 have sprinkler systems
Mix of fire resistive, non-combustible, and masonry non-combustible construction across portfolio

Driver roster shows experienced drivers; average years of experience approximately 15.5 years; senior drivers include Thomas Babich (25 yrs), Richard Jankowski (28 yrs), Michael Petroski (22 yrs), Gregory Kozlowski (21 yrs)
All drivers hold PA licenses with in-state credentials
Property claim count is very low (1 claim) with full closure (paid equals incurred)
Strong equity position of $34,373,200 relative to net income of $5,997,400
Revenue of $95,000,000 reflects substantial commercial operation
concerns: LOC-005 (Equipment Storage - Cranberry) has no sprinkler system and concrete roof
Workers Compensation is the largest loss line with 35 claims and $1,171,607 total incurred; indicative of elevated frequency in a construction/manufacturing environment
Claim count spiked in 2021 (15 claims) and 2024 (13 claims) suggesting volatility in loss frequency
Five-year carrier turnover: 4 different carriers in 5 years (CNA, Nationwide, Zurich, Berkshire Hathaway Guard, Nationwide), suggesting prior market instability or adverse underwriting results
Total liabilities of $68,963,500 exceed equity of $34,373,200, indicating leveraged balance sheet
LOC-002 (Main Equipment Yard & Warehouse) has a high TIV of $17,550,000 with $8,450,000 in contents, representing significant concentration risk
GL total incurred ($176,947) is notably higher than total paid ($105,421), suggesting open or developing claims
Auto total incurred ($99,900) is more than double total paid ($47,076), indicating open or developing claims
Two youngest/least experienced drivers — Kevin Zielinski (5 yrs) and Steven Novak (7 yrs) — may warrant monitoring
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year combined premium totals $7,549,115.32 across all carriers. Total claims across all lines from the loss summary: 52 claims, $1,315,756 total paid, $1,485,204 total incurred. WC dominates frequency and severity. Annual claim counts by year: 2020 (6), 2021 (15), 2022 (4), 2023 (10), 2024 (13). Premium trend increased from $1,369,245.71 in 2022 to $1,634,721.63 in 2024.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. operates a commercial construction business headquartered in Pittsburgh, PA. Operations span 5 locations totaling approximately 151,500 square feet, including a corporate office, main equipment yard and warehouse, fabrication shop, a branch office in Wexford, and equipment storage in Cranberry Township. The company reports annual revenue of $95,000,000 and total assets of $103,336,700.
